elements.title: Edit existing device (ID)
elements.tooltip: Enter the numeric ID from the Devices table below to load and edit that device. Leave blank (0) to create a new device instead. This is NOT the IP address.

elements.title: Community (v1/v2c)
elements.tooltip: Leave blank when editing to keep the existing stored value.

elements.title: v3 Auth Key
elements.tooltip: Leave blank when editing to keep the existing stored value.

elements.title: v3 Priv Key
elements.tooltip: Leave blank when editing to keep the existing stored value.

options.name: deviceForm

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, hostname, "ifDescr", "ifInOctets", "ifOutOctets" FROM interface ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500
